zh.lifeSummary: 當Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II於1036年出生時，他的父親John Doukas22歲，母親Eirēnē Pegonitissa18歲。他於1053年與Maria of Bulgaria在保加利亞蒙坦拿Охрид結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1071年登記服兵役。他在白展丁 艾皮爾被列為protoproedros (first president)。他去世於1077年10月14日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II于1036年出生时，他的父亲John Doukas22岁，母亲Eirēnē Pegonitissa18岁。他于1053年与Maria of Bulgaria在保加利亚蒙坦拿Охрид结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1071年登记服兵役。他在白展丁 艾皮爾被列为protoproedros (first president)。他去世于1077年10月14日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doukas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spyros, Anastasios, Aphrodite, Apostolos, Athanasios, Constantine, Costas, Dimitrios, Kalliopi, Kimon, Panagiotis.
Greek: from medieval Greek doukas ‘duke, lord’, from Latin dux. This was the name of a family of imperial rank in medieval Byzantium.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Empire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Impey   or   Empey  .

variants.name: Impey
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English imphage, imphey ‘hedge or enclosure made of saplings’ (Old English imphaga, imphæg), or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word, e.g. Impey Hall (Buttsbury, Essex) and Imphaugh Farm (Stonham Aspal, Suffolk). Compare Empey and Empie .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II was born in 1036, his father, John Doukas, was 22 and his mother, Eirēnē Pegonitissa, was 18. He married Maria of Bulgaria in 1053, in okhrid, Montana, Bulgaria. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1071. His occupation is listed as protoproedros (first president) in Byzantine Empire. He died on 14 October 1077, in İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II est né en 1036, son père, John Doukas, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eirēnē Pegonitissa, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Maria of Bulgaria en 1053, à okhrid, Montana, Bulgarie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1071. Sa profession de son indiquée est protoproedros (first president) à Empire byzantin. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1077, à İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II 1036 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Doukas 22 und seine Mutter Eirēnē Pegonitissa 18. Er hat 1053 in okhrid, Montana, Bulgarien Maria of Bulgaria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1071 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als protoproedros (first president) in Byzantinisches Reich aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1077 im Alter von 41 Jahren in İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II è nato il nel 1036, il suo padre, John Doukas, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Eirēnē Pegonitissa, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Maria of Bulgaria nel 1053, nel okhrid, Montana, Bulgaria. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1071. La sua occupazione è indicata come protoproedros (first president) nel Impero bizantino. Morì il 14 ottobre 1077, nel İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire IIが1036年に生まれた時，父John Doukasは22歳，母Eirēnē Pegonitissaは18歳であった。1053年にブルガリアモンタナОхридでMaria of Bulgariaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1071年に兵役登録をした。東ローマ帝国での職業はprotoproedros (first president)と記録されている。彼は1077年10月14日にトルコイスタンブルで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II(이)가 1036년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Doukas(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Eirēnē Pegonitissa(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1053년 불가리아 몽아나 Охрид에서 Maria of Bulgaria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1071년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 비자틴 피르에서 protoproedros (first president)이었다. 그는 1077년 10월 14일 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II nasceu em 1036, seu pai, John Doukas, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eirēnē Pegonitissa, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria of Bulgaria em 1053, em okhrid, Montana, Bulgária. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1071. Sua profissão aparece como protoproedros (first president) em Império Bizantino. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1077, em İstanbul, Turquia, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II родился в 1036 г., его отцу по имени John Doukas было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eirēnē Pegonitissa, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria of Bulgaria в 1053 г. в местности Охрид, монтана, Болгария. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1071 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии protoproedros (first president) в местности Византийская империя. Он умер 14 октября 1077 г. в местности истанбул, Турция в возрасте 41 год.

sm.1067-1080: mai le 1067 e o'o I le 1080

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II nació en 1036, su papá, John Doukas, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eirēnē Pegonitissa, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Maria of Bulgaria en 1053, en okhrid, Montana, Bulgaria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1071. Su ocupación registrada era protoproedros (first president) en Imperio bizantino. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1077, en İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 41 años.
